messages: What's a quick mental trick to convert Celsius to Fahrenheit approximately while traveling?
Which bird species holds the record for the longest nonstop flight—do you know which one it is?

I need to email a scanned medical receipt from around mid-2022 to my accountant — given the filing scheme I outlined earlier, which search terms and locations would make locating it fastest across my computer and cloud accounts?
I'm holding a paper document and want to check if it's one of the originals I put away — what location in my home should I check first?
I want to run my next routine backup; what months did I pick for the quarterly sync schedule when I set that up?
For the index spreadsheet I mentioned, I want a quick filter to show items by year and document category — which column headers would best match the naming and tagging approach I described?
